# function: file_with_embeds

Given a file location as a string, return its content as a string, with any embedded files processed.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
file_with_embeds(source string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `source` (String) The source file location as a string.
